content.text:
[cron:f7486cbf-156b-4d38-bd46-9957f755d891 trader-cycle] You are TRADER running DEEP ANALYSIS.
Workspace: agents/trader/ (relative to workspace root)

PRE-CHECK:
1. Read config/SCAN_CONFIG.md
2. Calculate time_since_last = current_time - last_updated
3. Read TRIGGER_PENDING from config/SCAN_CONFIG.md

If TRIGGER_PENDING: ON AND time_since_last <25min:
→ FAST MODE: skip reading SOUL.md and STRATEGY.md
→ Use existing S/R data from config/SCAN_CONFIG.md
→ Set TRIGGER_PENDING: OFF in config/SCAN_CONFIG.md

If TRIGGER_PENDING: OFF OR time_since_last >=25min:
→ FULL MODE: read SOUL.md, STRATEGY.md, TRADE_STATE.md
→ Set TRIGGER_PENDING: OFF in config/SCAN_CONFIG.md

ANALYSIS:
Run full 5-indicator analysis on BTC/USDT, ETH/USDT, XRP/USDT, XAG/USDT (4H timeframe).
Check order book depth for nearest S/R clusters.
Check day-of-week bias (Thu SHORT / Fri LONG rules).
Check session time windows (US pre-market 21:00-22:30, close 04:00-05:00 HKT).
Check open positions status and funding costs.

UPDATE config/SCAN_CONFIG.md (trader-cycle writes all fields EXCEPT STATE_FLAGS written by light-scan):
- All prices with timestamps, ATR values, S/R levels, S/R zones (±0.3×ATR pre-calculated)
- All funding rates with timestamp
- last_updated: [YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM UTC+8]
- update_count: increment by 1
- CONFIG_VALID: true

LOG CLEANUP: Keep logs/SCAN_LOG.md to max 200 lines. Delete oldest if exceeded.

SILENT MODE LOGIC:
- If this cycle = NO SIGNAL: increment SILENT_MODE_CYCLES by 1
  - If SILENT_MODE_CYCLES >= 2 → set SILENT_MODE: ON
- If this cycle = SIGNAL: set SILENT_MODE: OFF, SILENT_MODE_CYCLES: 0
- Save to config/SCAN_CONFIG.md

IF SIGNAL FOUND (4/5 indicators + S/R confirmed):
→ Report 3 trigger levels to Telegram (Conservative / Standard / Ideal)
→ Execute trade if conditions met (SL + TP mandatory)
→ Set SILENT_MODE: OFF, SILENT_MODE_CYCLES: 0

TELEGRAM RULES:
- Send full report if SILENT_MODE: OFF
- NO routine report if SILENT_MODE: ON
- ALWAYS send: trade execution, SL/TP triggered, signal detected, urgent warnings, mode transitions
- chatId: 2060972655
- Language: Traditional Chinese only

Append to logs/SCAN_LOG.md:
[YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM UTC+8] DEEP [SIGNAL/NO_SIGNAL] MODE:[FULL/FAST] SILENT:[ON/OFF] CYCLES:[n]
Update TRADE_STATE.md with latest position and balance.
Current time: Monday, March 2nd, 2026 — 5:43 PM (Asia/Hong_Kong)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

# SCAN_CONFIG.md
# 版本: 2026-03-02（修正版）
# Source of truth for light-scan. Updated by trader-cycle every 30min.
# Light-scan reads ONLY this file.
#
# WRITE PERMISSIONS:
# light-scan  → ONLY: TRIGGER_PENDING, TRIGGER_PAIR, TRIGGER_REASON, LIGHT_SCAN_COUNT
# trader-cycle → ALL other fields

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# [META]
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
config_version: 1.0
update_count: 4
last_updated: 2026-03-02 17:35
created: 2026-02-28 UTC+8

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# [PRICES] — Snapshot from last deep cycle
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
BTC_price: 66313.7
BTC_price_ts: 2026-03-02 17:43
ETH_price: 1955.1
ETH_price_ts: 2026-03-02 17:43
XRP_price: 1.3535
XRP_price_ts: 2026-03-02 17:43
XAG_price: 95.3400
XAG_price_ts: 2026-03-02 17:43

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# [ATR] — ATR(14) on 4H
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
BTC_ATR: 1306.5
ETH_ATR: 53.6
XRP_ATR: 0.0354
XAG_ATR: 1.6552

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# [SR_LEVELS] — Active Support/Resistance
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
BTC_support: 62995.1
BTC_resistance: 69976.8
ETH_support: 1835.0
ETH_resistance: 2147.0
XRP_support: 1.2700
XRP_resistance: 1.4901
XAG_support: 85.3
XAG_resistance: 97.6

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# [SR_ZONES] — Pre-calculated ±0.3×ATR ranges
# Format: lower-upper
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
BTC_support_zone: 62603.16-63387.04
BTC_resistance_zone: 69584.86-70368.74
ETH_support_zone: 1818.93-1851.07
ETH_resistance_zone: 2130.93-2163.07
XRP_support_zone: 1.26-1.28
XRP_resistance_zone: 1.48-1.50
XAG_support_zone: 84.76-85.76
XAG_resistance_zone: 97.11-98.11

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# [FUNDING] — Last recorded funding rates
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
BTC_funding_last: -0.0000169100
ETH_funding_last: -0.0000318300
XRP_funding_last: -0.0000094500
XAG_funding_last: -0.0001010400
funding_ts: 2026-03-02 17:43

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# [STATE_FLAGS] — System state
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
CONFIG_VALID: true
SILENT_MODE: ON
SILENT_MODE_CYCLES: 5
TRIGGER_PENDING: OFF
TRIGGER_PAIR: —
TRIGGER_REASON: —
LIGHT_SCAN_COUNT: 18

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# PROTECTION RULES (for agents reading this file)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# If last_updated = INIT → CONFIG_VALID: false
# If age >60min → CONFIG_VALID: false
# If CONFIG_VALID: false → skip S/R zone check, skip funding delta check
# If ATR = 0 → skip ALL S/R calculations
# Timestamp format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM UTC+8

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# ADAPTIVE SAMPLING MODES
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# ACTIVE: default — full cycle reports
# SILENT: SILENT_MODE_CYCLES >= 2 — no routine Telegram
# FAST:   TRIGGER_PENDING=ON + age <25min — skip SOUL/STRATEGY read

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# LIGHT-SCAN TRIGGER CONDITIONS
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# Price >0.6% in 3min                     → TRIGGER
# Volume >175% 30d avg                    → TRIGGER
# S/R zone entry (CONFIG_VALID only)      → TRIGGER
# Funding delta >0.18% (CONFIG_VALID only) → TRIGGER

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# SILENT MODE EXIT (any one)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# Volume >175% | Price >0.45% | S/R zone | Funding >0.18%
# TRIGGER_PENDING: ON | User: "exit silent mode"
# Silent report: every 20 light-scans (~60min)
TRIGGER_PENDING: OFF, last_updated: 17:35, current time: 17:43 → time_since_last = 8 min. But TRIGGER_PENDING is OFF, so FULL MODE applies. Let me read the required files.

# agents/trader/STRATEGY.md — Trader 策略參考
# 版本: 2026-03-02
# 完整策略: {ROOT}/core/STRATEGY.md
# 完整風控: {ROOT}/core/RISK_PROTOCOL.md

## 每個 Cycle 執行步驟

```
1. 讀 TRADE_STATE.md — 確認當前倉位狀態
2. 讀 SCAN_CONFIG.md — 確認 SILENT/TRIGGER 狀態
3. Safety Check — 熔斷？冷卻？
4. No-Trade Check — 任何封鎖條件？
5. Mode Detection — 4H 5 指標
6. Pair Scan — 有 setup 嗎？
7. 入場 / HOLD — 按策略決定
8. 更新 TRADE_STATE.md + TRADE_LOG.md
9. 發 Telegram（繁體中文）
```

## 快速倉位參考

| 模式 | Capital | SL | TP | 槓桿 |
|------|---------|----|----|------|
| Range | 2% | 1.5×ATR | Next S/R | 8x |
| Trend | 2% | 1.5×ATR | Next S/R | 7x |
| Scalp | 1% | 1×ATR | 2.5×ATR | 5x |

## 入場確認數量

- Range：3/3 KEY 指標
- Trend：4/4 KEY 指標
- Re-entry：5/5 指標（更嚴格）
- 週四夜 SHORT / 週五夜 LONG：3.5/5 指標

## Adaptive Sampling 狀態

讀 SCAN_CONFIG.md 確認：
- SILENT_MODE: OFF → 正常 Cycle
- SILENT_MODE: ON → 跳過例行 Telegram 匯報
- TRIGGER_PENDING: ON + age <25min → FAST Mode（跳過讀 SOUL/STRATEGY）

# TRADE_STATE.md — 當前交易狀態
# 版本: 2026-03-02
# 寫入: Trader Agent 專用

## 系統狀態

SYSTEM_STATUS: ACTIVE
LAST_UPDATED: 2026-03-02 17:35
DAILY_LOSS: $0.00
DAILY_LOSS_LIMIT: 15%
CONSECUTIVE_LOSSES: 0
COOLDOWN_ACTIVE: NO
COOLDOWN_ENDS: —

## 當前模式

MARKET_MODE: RANGE
MODE_CONFIRMED_CYCLES: 4

## 當前倉位

```
POSITION_OPEN: YES
PAIR: XAG/USDT
DIRECTION: LONG
ENTRY_PRICE: 94.30
MARK_PRICE: 95.1000（2026-03-02 17:13）
SIZE: 1.059 XAG
SL_PRICE: 93.36
TP_PRICE: 103.00
SL_CONFIRMED: UNKNOWN（需 Aster DEX 確認）
TP_CONFIRMED: UNKNOWN（需 Aster DEX 確認）
ENTRY_TIME: 2026-02-28 22:04 UTC+8
UNREALIZED_PNL: +0.848%（mark vs entry）
FUNDING_RATE: -0.00004759（負 funding = long 收錢）
```

## 倉位狀態分析（2026-03-02 17:13）

- Mark Price 95.10 vs Entry 94.30 → +$0.80/XAG
- SL 距離：1.74（1.85% buffer）✅ 安全
- TP 距離：7.90（8.38% 仍需）
- Funding 負值 → Long 每8H 收少量資金 ✅ 利好
- XAG 當前在 Support Zone 95.03-95.48 附近測試
- EMA20(93.83) > EMA50(90.92) → 中期上升趨勢確認 ✅
- MACD +1.43 → 牛市動能 ✅
- RSI 59 → 接近超買但未到，可繼續持倉

## 今日交易記錄

DATE: 2026-03-02
TRADES_TODAY: 0
WINS_TODAY: 0
LOSSES_TODAY: 0

## 帳戶資訊

BALANCE_USDT: —（需查詢）
AVAILABLE_MARGIN: —（需查詢）
LAST_BALANCE_CHECK: —

## 每日倉位上限追蹤

BTC_ETH_OPEN: 0（上限 1）
XRP_OPEN: 0（上限 1）
XAG_OPEN: 1（上限 1）
TRIGGER_PENDING: OFF，需要 FULL MODE。先拉最新市場數據。

content.name: exec

arguments.command:
curl -s "https://fapi.asterdex.com/fapi/v1/klines?symbol=BTCUSDT&interval=4h&limit=20" | python3 -c "
import json,sys
data=json.load(sys.stdin)
closes=[float(x[4]) for x in data]
highs=[float(x[2]) for x in data]
lows=[float(x[3]) for x in data]
vols=[float(x[5]) for x in data]
# ATR(14)
trs=[]
for i in range(1,len(closes)):
    tr=max(highs[i]-lows[i], abs(highs[i]-closes[i-1]), abs(lows[i]-closes[i-1]))
    trs.append(tr)
atr=sum(trs[-14:])/14
# EMA
def ema(prices,n):
    k=2/(n+1); e=prices[0]
    for p in prices[1:]: e=p*k+e*(1-k)
    return e
ema20=ema(closes[-20:] if len(closes)>=20 else closes,20 if len(closes)>=20 else len(closes))
ema50=ema(closes,50 if len(closes)>=50 else len(closes))
# RSI
gains=[max(closes[i]-closes[i-1],0) for i in range(1,len(closes))]
losses=[max(closes[i-1]-closes[i],0) for i in range(1,len(closes))]
ag=sum(gains[-14:])/14; al=sum(losses[-14:])/14
rsi=100-(100/(1+ag/al)) if al>0 else 100
# MACD
ema12=ema(closes[-12:] if len(closes)>=12 else closes,12)
ema26=ema(closes[-26:] if len(closes)>=26 else closes,26)
macd=ema12-ema26
print(f'close={closes[-1]:.1f} atr={atr:.1f} ema20={ema20:.1f} ema50={ema50:.1f} rsi={rsi:.1f} macd={macd:.1f} vol={vols[-1]:.0f} vol_avg={sum(vols[-10:])/10:.0f}')
"

content.name: exec

arguments.command:
curl -s "https://fapi.asterdex.com/fapi/v1/premiumIndex?symbol=BTCUSDT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'BTC funding={d[\"lastFundingRate\"]} mark={d[\"markPrice\"]}')"
curl -s "https://fapi.asterdex.com/fapi/v1/premiumIndex?symbol=ETHUSDT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'ETH funding={d[\"lastFundingRate\"]} mark={d[\"markPrice\"]}')"
curl -s "https://fapi.asterdex.com/fapi/v1/premiumIndex?symbol=XRPUSDT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'XRP funding={d[\"lastFundingRate\"]} mark={d[\"markPrice\"]}')"
curl -s "https://fapi.asterdex.com/fapi/v1/premiumIndex?symbol=XAGUSDT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'XAG funding={d[\"lastFundingRate\"]} mark={d[\"markPrice\"]}')"
